name: Runtime Regression Probe
description: Scheduled probe that exercises deterministic tooling, MCP search, one runtime regression, and a DB-backed action while preserving an explicit CQRS split assessment.

definition.source_prose: Exercise one workflow path that uses deterministic tooling, MCP-backed search, runtime regression, and a DB-backed action while surfacing breakage instead of hiding it.

jobs.label: agent_synthesis
jobs.prompt: Use the prior workflow outputs to create `artifacts/workflow_eval/probe_exec_20260416/runtime_regression_probe.handoff.md`. The file must contain exactly these markdown headings: `# Search Proof`, `# Authority Gaps`, and `# Next Verification`. Base the content only on upstream workflow outputs. If any upstream step failed or is missing, say so plainly and mark the handoff as non-authoritative. After writing the file, reply with exactly one JSON object on stdout: {"step":"agent_synthesis","status":"ok","file":"artifacts/workflow_eval/probe_exec_20260416/runtime_regression_probe.handoff.md"}.
